tasks.label: Compile Current AHK
args: & { $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $baseFilePath = 'D:\Apps\AutoHotkey\_App\v2\AutoHotkey64.exe'; $compilerPath = 'D:\Apps\AutoHotkey\_App\Compiler\Ahk2Exe.exe'; $scriptPath = '${file}'; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $compilerPath -PathType Leaf)) { throw "AHK compiler not found at '$compilerPath'." }; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $baseFilePath -PathType Leaf)) { throw "AHK base file not found at '$baseFilePath'." }; $resolvedScriptPath = (Resolve-Path -LiteralPath $scriptPath).Path; if ([System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($resolvedScriptPath) -ne '.ahk') { throw "Expected an .ahk file, got '$resolvedScriptPath'." }; $scriptDirectory = Split-Path -Path $resolvedScriptPath -Parent; $scriptBaseName = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($resolvedScriptPath); $outputPath = Join-Path -Path $scriptDirectory -ChildPath ($scriptBaseName + '.exe'); $iconPath = Join-Path -Path $scriptDirectory -ChildPath 'icon.ico'; $arguments = @('/in', $resolvedScriptPath, '/out', $outputPath, '/bin', $baseFilePath); if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $iconPath -PathType Leaf) { $arguments += @('/icon', $iconPath) }; & $compilerPath @arguments; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }
